testcase.name: test_valid_login

failure.message: TimeoutError: Waiting for element '#dashboard-header' timed out after 30000ms. Network response was 504 Gateway Timeout during login POST.

testcase.failure: TimeoutError: Waiting for element '#dashboard-header' timed out after 30000ms. File "test_evite_login.py", line 44, in test_valid_login WebDriverWait(self.driver, 30).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "dashboard-header"))) selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: timeout: Timed out receiving message from renderer: 30.000 (Session info: chrome=122.0.6261.94)
